items.title: AMD’s new X100 chip lineup puts Strix Halo into robots – APUs for physical AI bring Zen 5 CPU, RDNA 3.5 GPU cores to compete with Intel’s Panther Lake
items.summary: Countering Intel’s recent moves, AMD is bringing its Strix Halo APUs to the realm of robots, and physical AI. Designed for 24/7 operation and a 10-year embedded lifecycle, X100 will also be offered as a Kria System on Module (SOM) robot developer platform.
items.title_original: AMD’s new X100 chip lineup puts Strix Halo into robots – APUs for physical AI bring Zen 5 CPU, RDNA 3.5 GPU cores to compete with Intel’s Panther Lake
items.title_en: AMD’s new X100 chip lineup puts Strix Halo into robots – APUs for physical AI bring Zen 5 CPU, RDNA 3.5 GPU cores to compete with Intel’s Panther Lake
items.title_bilingual: AMD’s new X100 chip lineup puts Strix Halo into robots – APUs for physical AI bring Zen 5 CPU, RDNA 3.5 GPU cores to compete with Intel’s Panther Lake
items.summary_zh: 为了对抗英特尔最近的举措，AMD 正在将其 Strix Halo APU 引入机器人和物理人工智能领域。 X100 专为 24/7 运行和 10 年嵌入式生命周期而设计，还将作为 Kria 系统模块 (SOM) 机器人开发平台提供。

items.title: AMD takes the wraps off its Instinct MI455X AI accelerator — CDNA 5 and Helios rack-scale architecture combine to take the fight to Nvidia in the data center
items.summary: AMD showed off its MI455X accelerator at its Advancing AI 2026 event, demonstrating its strong competitive performance, large HBM memory capacity, and Helios rack-scale architecture.
items.title_original: AMD takes the wraps off its Instinct MI455X AI accelerator — CDNA 5 and Helios rack-scale architecture combine to take the fight to Nvidia in the data center
items.title_en: AMD takes the wraps off its Instinct MI455X AI accelerator — CDNA 5 and Helios rack-scale architecture combine to take the fight to Nvidia in the data center
items.title_bilingual: AMD takes the wraps off its Instinct MI455X AI accelerator — CDNA 5 and Helios rack-scale architecture combine to take the fight to Nvidia in the data center
items.summary_zh: AMD在Advancing AI 2026活动上展示了MI455X加速器，展示了其强大的竞争性能、大HBM内存容量和Helios机架规模架构。

items.title: AMD and Cerebras partner on low-latency, high-throughput AI inference — EPYC processors in Helios rack-scale infrastructure paired with Cerebras' Wafer-Scale Engine (WSE) solutions
items.summary: When AMD's Helios meets giant wafers from Cerebras, it is not like when Odysseus meets with the Laestrygonian Giants, they collaborate to build an ultimate data center solution.
items.title_original: AMD and Cerebras partner on low-latency, high-throughput AI inference — EPYC processors in Helios rack-scale infrastructure paired with Cerebras' Wafer-Scale Engine (WSE) solutions
items.title_en: AMD and Cerebras partner on low-latency, high-throughput AI inference — EPYC processors in Helios rack-scale infrastructure paired with Cerebras' Wafer-Scale Engine (WSE) solutions
items.title_bilingual: AMD and Cerebras partner on low-latency, high-throughput AI inference — EPYC processors in Helios rack-scale infrastructure paired with Cerebras' Wafer-Scale Engine (WSE) solutions
items.summary_zh: 当AMD的Helios遇到Cerebras的巨型晶圆时，并不像奥德修斯遇到Laestrygonian巨人那样，他们合作构建了终极数据中心解决方案。

items.title: Nvidia RTX 3090 and RTX 3050 team up to hit 144 FPS at 4K — Lossless Scaling turns old Ampere GPUs into a gaming powerhouse
items.summary: A gaming enthusiast leverages Lossless Scaling to supercharge a gaming PC with a GeForce RTX 3090 and GeForce RTX 3050 to deliver up to 144 FPS at 4K.
items.title_original: Nvidia RTX 3090 and RTX 3050 team up to hit 144 FPS at 4K — Lossless Scaling turns old Ampere GPUs into a gaming powerhouse
items.title_en: Nvidia RTX 3090 and RTX 3050 team up to hit 144 FPS at 4K — Lossless Scaling turns old Ampere GPUs into a gaming powerhouse
items.title_bilingual: Nvidia RTX 3090 and RTX 3050 team up to hit 144 FPS at 4K — Lossless Scaling turns old Ampere GPUs into a gaming powerhouse
items.summary_zh: 游戏爱好者利用无损缩放功能，通过 GeForce RTX 3090 和 GeForce RTX 3050 为游戏 PC 提供强大性能，在 4K 分辨率下提供高达 144 FPS 的性能。

items.title: New semiconductor firm breaks cover, backed by $43 million in early-stage funding — TYLsemi aims to deliver custom silicon to customers without breaking the bank
items.summary: TYLsemi is set to offer pre-validated chiplets, along with custom ASIC design services, and build highly custom multi-tile processors at relatively low costs.
items.title_original: New semiconductor firm breaks cover, backed by $43 million in early-stage funding — TYLsemi aims to deliver custom silicon to customers without breaking the bank
items.title_en: New semiconductor firm breaks cover, backed by $43 million in early-stage funding — TYLsemi aims to deliver custom silicon to customers without breaking the bank
items.title_bilingual: New semiconductor firm breaks cover, backed by $43 million in early-stage funding — TYLsemi aims to deliver custom silicon to customers without breaking the bank
items.summary_zh: TYLsemi 将提供预先验证的小芯片以及定制 ASIC 设计服务，并以相对较低的成本构建高度定制的多块处理器。

items.title: AMD’s 256-core Epyc 9996 ‘Venice’ claims up to a 3.4x jump over Intel Xeon competition, 20% over Nvidia Vera – Zen 6 comes with up to 1024MB of L3, 16-channel memory, and 5GHz+ clock speeds
items.summary: After over a year of teases, AMD has finally provided details on its 256-core Venice CPU with the Zen 6 architecture, now known as the Epyc 9996.
items.title_original: AMD’s 256-core Epyc 9996 ‘Venice’ claims up to a 3.4x jump over Intel Xeon competition, 20% over Nvidia Vera – Zen 6 comes with up to 1024MB of L3, 16-channel memory, and 5GHz+ clock speeds
items.title_en: AMD’s 256-core Epyc 9996 ‘Venice’ claims up to a 3.4x jump over Intel Xeon competition, 20% over Nvidia Vera – Zen 6 comes with up to 1024MB of L3, 16-channel memory, and 5GHz+ clock speeds
items.title_bilingual: AMD’s 256-core Epyc 9996 ‘Venice’ claims up to a 3.4x jump over Intel Xeon competition, 20% over Nvidia Vera – Zen 6 comes with up to 1024MB of L3, 16-channel memory, and 5GHz+ clock speeds
items.summary_zh: 经过一年多的宣传，AMD 终于提供了其采用 Zen 6 架构的 256 核 Venice CPU（现在称为 Epyc 9996）的详细信息。

items.title: AMD’s Venice-X CPU launches in 2027 with 1152 MB of 3D V-Cache, 96 cores, and 5.15 GHz boost clock – Zen 6 CPU for high-performance computing comes with major pillars of Venice
items.summary: AMD is returning to 3D V-Cache in its data center range of CPUs with Venice-X, which it has confirmed will launch in the second half of 2027, with 1152 MB of L3 and clock speeds up to 5.15 GHz.
items.title_original: AMD’s Venice-X CPU launches in 2027 with 1152 MB of 3D V-Cache, 96 cores, and 5.15 GHz boost clock – Zen 6 CPU for high-performance computing comes with major pillars of Venice
items.title_en: AMD’s Venice-X CPU launches in 2027 with 1152 MB of 3D V-Cache, 96 cores, and 5.15 GHz boost clock – Zen 6 CPU for high-performance computing comes with major pillars of Venice
items.title_bilingual: AMD’s Venice-X CPU launches in 2027 with 1152 MB of 3D V-Cache, 96 cores, and 5.15 GHz boost clock – Zen 6 CPU for high-performance computing comes with major pillars of Venice
items.summary_zh: AMD 正在其数据中心 CPU 系列 Venice-X 中回归 3D V-Cache，并已确认将于 2027 年下半年推出，L3 容量为 1152 MB，时钟速度高达 5.15 GHz。

items.title: Geekbench 7 introduces biggest overhaul yet — real-world CPU testing, new media workloads, AI benchmarks, and CUDA support
items.summary: The latest update introduces more realistic CPU and GPU workloads, redesigned multi-core testing, AI-focused benchmarks, larger datasets, and CUDA support for Nvidia GPUs.

items.title: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%
items.summary: GM CFO Paul Jacobson says that the company's costs are expected to increase by $1.5 to $2 billion, primarily due to increasing memory chip costs. The move comes as the RAM shortage is affecting the automotive industry, right as cars are requiring more memory and storage due to infotainment and ADAS features.
items.title_original: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%
items.title_en: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%
items.title_bilingual: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%
items.summary_zh: 通用汽车首席财务官Paul Jacobson表示，公司成本预计将增加1.5至20亿美元，主要是由于内存芯片成本增加。此举出台之际，RAM 短缺正在影响汽车行业，而汽车由于信息娱乐和 ADAS 功能而需要更多的内存和存储空间。

items.title: Kill switches for most powerful AI models proposed by Bipartisan bill — DHS could order throttling or full shutdown, with fines up to $20 million per day
items.summary: The bill amends the Homeland Security Act and covers companies earning at least $500 million in annual revenue from a model trained with compute costing more than $100 million.
items.title_original: Kill switches for most powerful AI models proposed by Bipartisan bill — DHS could order throttling or full shutdown, with fines up to $20 million per day
items.title_en: Kill switches for most powerful AI models proposed by Bipartisan bill — DHS could order throttling or full shutdown, with fines up to $20 million per day
items.title_bilingual: Kill switches for most powerful AI models proposed by Bipartisan bill — DHS could order throttling or full shutdown, with fines up to $20 million per day
items.summary_zh: 该法案修订了《国土安全法》，涵盖了通过花费超过 1 亿美元的计算训练的模型获得至少 5 亿美元年收入的公司。

items.title: Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
items.summary: With the limitations of copper looming, the industry is transitioning to photonic interconnects to scale data center capabilities. We spoke to experts such as Lightmatter chief executive Nick Harris about the new scale-out paradigm and the battle for control over emerging standards.
items.title_original: Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
items.title_en: Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
items.title_zh: 光学内部和规模之战——人工智能行业如何竞相集成光子互连
items.title_bilingual: 光学内部和规模之战——人工智能行业如何竞相集成光子互连 / Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
items.summary_zh: 随着铜的局限性日益显现，该行业正在转向光子互连以扩展数据中心的能力。我们采访了 Lightmatter 首席执行官尼克·哈里斯 (Nick Harris) 等专家，讨论了新的横向扩展范式以及对新兴标准的控制权之争。

items.summary_zh: 一位消息人士告诉路透社，一些客户已经讨论了两年或更长时间的承诺。

items.title: Arctic Senza AI 370 review: Strix Point in a stealthy under-desk fanless design
items.summary: The Arctic Senza AI 370 is a fanless mini PC designed to mount under your desk. Everyday performance isn’t held back by the lack of active cooling, and its soldered dual-channel 32GB LPDDR5X-8000 is appreciated during the RAM shortages. The meager front panel I/O is the only major drawback to the design.
items.title_original: Arctic Senza AI 370 review: Strix Point in a stealthy under-desk fanless design
items.title_en: Arctic Senza AI 370 review: Strix Point in a stealthy under-desk fanless design
items.title_zh: Arctic Senza AI 370 评测：采用隐形桌下无风扇设计的 Strix Point
items.title_bilingual: Arctic Senza AI 370 评测：采用隐形桌下无风扇设计的 Strix Point / Arctic Senza AI 370 review: Strix Point in a stealthy under-desk fanless design
items.summary_zh: Arctic Senza AI 370 是一款无风扇迷你电脑，设计用于安装在办公桌下。日常性能不会因缺乏主动冷却而受到影响，其焊接的双通道 32GB LPDDR5X-8000 在 RAM 短缺期间受到赞赏。前面板 I/O 少是该设计的唯一主要缺点。

items.title: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
items.summary: Data center projects are facing increasing opposition from surrounding communities, making consent even far scarcer than the chips and power needed to run these facilities. Any developer planning to construct one must now consider the people living around the proposed site and take account for the months or years needed to approve it, if it even gets the green light.
items.title_original: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
items.title_en: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
items.title_bilingual: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
items.summary_zh: 数据中心项目面临着周边社区越来越多的反对，这使得同意比运行这些设施所需的芯片和电力更加稀缺。任何计划建造的开发商现在都必须考虑居住在拟议地点周围的人们，并考虑批准它所需的数月或数年，即使它获得了批准。

items_ai.title: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%
items_ai.summary: GM CFO Paul Jacobson says that the company's costs are expected to increase by $1.5 to $2 billion, primarily due to increasing memory chip costs. The move comes as the RAM shortage is affecting the automotive industry, right as cars are requiring more memory and storage due to infotainment and ADAS features.
items_ai.title_original: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%
items_ai.title_en: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%
items_ai.title_bilingual: AI memory shortage is now increasing the price of cars — GM warns of vast cost increases, BYD hikes driver assistance prices 20%
items_ai.summary_zh: 通用汽车首席财务官Paul Jacobson表示，公司成本预计将增加1.5至20亿美元，主要是由于内存芯片成本增加。此举出台之际，RAM 短缺正在影响汽车行业，而汽车由于信息娱乐和 ADAS 功能而需要更多的内存和存储空间。

items_ai.title: Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
items_ai.summary: With the limitations of copper looming, the industry is transitioning to photonic interconnects to scale data center capabilities. We spoke to experts such as Lightmatter chief executive Nick Harris about the new scale-out paradigm and the battle for control over emerging standards.
items_ai.title_original: Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
items_ai.title_en: Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects

items_ai.title_bilingual: 光学内部和规模之战——人工智能行业如何竞相集成光子互连 / Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
items_ai.summary_zh: 随着铜的局限性日益显现，该行业正在转向光子互连以扩展数据中心的能力。我们采访了 Lightmatter 首席执行官尼克·哈里斯 (Nick Harris) 等专家，讨论了新的横向扩展范式以及对新兴标准的控制权之争。

items_ai.title: Arctic Senza AI 370 review: Strix Point in a stealthy under-desk fanless design
items_ai.summary: The Arctic Senza AI 370 is a fanless mini PC designed to mount under your desk. Everyday performance isn’t held back by the lack of active cooling, and its soldered dual-channel 32GB LPDDR5X-8000 is appreciated during the RAM shortages. The meager front panel I/O is the only major drawback to the design.

items_ai.title_en: Arctic Senza AI 370 review: Strix Point in a stealthy under-desk fanless design

items_ai.title: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
items_ai.summary: Data center projects are facing increasing opposition from surrounding communities, making consent even far scarcer than the chips and power needed to run these facilities. Any developer planning to construct one must now consider the people living around the proposed site and take account for the months or years needed to approve it, if it even gets the green light.
items_ai.title_original: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
items_ai.title_en: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
items_ai.title_bilingual: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
items_ai.summary_zh: 数据中心项目面临着周边社区越来越多的反对，这使得同意比运行这些设施所需的芯片和电力更加稀缺。任何计划建造的开发商现在都必须考虑居住在拟议地点周围的人们，并考虑批准它所需的数月或数年，即使它获得了批准。
